CustomField.description: SOSL Searches usage with visual indicator. Shows percentage of limit consumed with warning (80%) and danger (90%) thresholds.
CustomField.formula: IF(LimitsSoslSearchesMax__c = 0, "✅ N/A", IF(LimitsSoslSearchesConsumed__c / LimitsSoslSearchesMax__c >= $CustomMetadata.UoWLimitsThreshold__mdt.SoslSearches.TransactionRedPercent__c / 100, "⛔", IF(LimitsSoslSearchesConsumed__c / LimitsSoslSearchesMax__c >= $CustomMetadata.UoWLimitsThreshold__mdt.SoslSearches.TransactionAmberPercent__c / 100, "⚠️", "✅") ) & " " & TEXT(ROUND(LimitsSoslSearchesConsumed__c / LimitsSoslSearchesMax__c * 100, 1)) & "% (" & TEXT(LimitsSoslSearchesConsumed__c) & " / " & TEXT(LimitsSoslSearchesMax__c) & ")" )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: SOSL Searches usage with visual indicator. Shows percentage of limit consumed with warning (80%) and danger (90%) thresholds.
CustomField.label: SOSL Searches
